########## Agrus Kos, Wojek Veteran ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Color
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Agrus Kos, Wojek Veteran
 * {3}{R}{W}
 * Legendary Creature — Human Soldier
 * 3/3
 * Whenever Agrus Kos attacks, attacking red creatures get +2/+0 and attacking white creatures get +0/+2 until end of turn.
 */
val AgrusKosWojekVeteran = card("Agrus Kos, Wojek Veteran") {
    manaCost = "{3}{R}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "WR"
    typeLine = "Legendary Creature — Human Soldier"
    oracleText = "Whenever Agrus Kos attacks, attacking red creatures get +2/+0 and attacking white creatures get +0/+2 until end of turn."
    power = 3
    toughness = 3
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.Attacks
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            Effects.ForEachInGroup(
                GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.withColor(Color.RED).attacking()),
                Effects.ModifyStats(2, 0, EffectTarget.Self)
            ),
            Effects.ForEachInGroup(
                GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.withColor(Color.WHITE).attacking()),
                Effects.ModifyStats(0, 2, EffectTarget.Self)
            )
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "190"
        artist = "Donato Giancola"
        flavorText = "Lieutenant Kos has never met a group of recruits he could not inspire or a mob he could not quell."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/c/2/c2521942-0ecd-45a9-bac6-04267a2c29ed.jpg"
    }
}

/**
 * Auratouched Mage
 * {5}{W}
 * Creature — Human Wizard
 * 3/3
 * When this creature enters, search your library for an Aura card that could enchant it. If this creature is still on the battlefield, put that Aura card onto the battlefield attached to it. Otherwise, reveal the Aura card and put it into your hand. Then shuffle.
 */
val AuratouchedMage = card("Auratouched Mage") {
    manaCost = "{5}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Creature — Human Wizard"
    oracleText = "When this creature enters, search your library for an Aura card that could enchant it. If this creature is still on the battlefield, put that Aura card onto the battlefield attached to it. Otherwise, reveal the Aura card and put it into your hand. Then shuffle."
    power = 3
    toughness = 3
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: IfElse

        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

/**
 * Autochthon Wurm
 * {10}{G}{G}{G}{W}{W}
 * Creature — Wurm
 * 9/14
 * Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.)
 * Trample
 */
val AutochthonWurm = card("Autochthon Wurm") {
    manaCost = "{10}{G}{G}{G}{W}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "WG"
    typeLine = "Creature — Wurm"
    oracleText = "Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.)\nTrample"
    power = 9
    toughness = 14
    keywords(Keyword.CONVOKE, Keyword.TRAMPLE)
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "191"
        artist = "Michael Phillippi"
        flavorText = "The trainer awoke to begin the journey from the wurm's tail to its head. The sun was setting when she arrived."

########## Barbarian Riftcutter ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetPermanent


/**
 * Barbarian Riftcutter
 * {4}{R}
 * Creature — Human Barbarian
 * 3/3
 * {R}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target land.
 */
val BarbarianRiftcutter = card("Barbarian Riftcutter") {
    manaCost = "{4}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Creature — Human Barbarian"
    oracleText = "{R}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target land."
    power = 3
    toughness = 3
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{R}"), Costs.SacrificeSelf)
        val t = target("target", TargetPermanent(filter = TargetFilter.Land))
        effect = Effects.Move(t, Zone.GRAVEYARD, byDestruction = true)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "114"
        artist = "Carl Critchlow"
        flavorText = "\"Riftcutters are suicidal anarchists, waving those lightning axes around so much that the walls are as likely to fall as their foes.\"\n—Heruj, Selesnya initiate"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/1/5/152f4cfa-4f03-404d-a6f7-24c27505906f.jpg"
    }
}

// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.AnyTarget


/**
 * Benevolent Ancestor
 * {2}{W}
 * Creature — Spirit
 * 0/4
 * Defender (This creature can't attack.)
 * {T}: Prevent the next 1 damage that would be dealt to any target this turn.
 */
val BenevolentAncestor = card("Benevolent Ancestor") {
    manaCost = "{2}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Creature — Spirit"
    oracleText = "Defender (This creature can't attack.)\n{T}: Prevent the next 1 damage that would be dealt to any target this turn."
    power = 0
    toughness = 4
    keywords(Keyword.DEFENDER)
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Tap
        val t = target("target", AnyTarget())
        effect = Effects.PreventNextDamage(1, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "3"
        artist = "Nick Percival"
        flavorText = "Although the door is flimsy and the lock pathetically small, Josuri's family never fears the night outside."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/f/2/f23110b5-0dd4-49a2-8991-bc673aed53c9.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.TimingRule


/**
 * Birds of Paradise
 * {G}
 * Creature — Bird
 * 0/1
 * Flying
 * {T}: Add one mana of any color.
 */
val BirdsOfParadise = card("Birds of Paradise") {
    manaCost = "{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Creature — Bird"
    oracleText = "Flying\n{T}: Add one mana of any color."
    power = 0
    toughness = 1
    keywords(Keyword.FLYING)
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Tap
        effect = Effects.AddManaOfChoice()
        manaAbility = true
        timing = TimingRule.ManaAbility
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "153"
        artist = "Marcelo Vignali"
        flavorText = "Long ago, birds of paradise littered the skies. Thanks to the city's sprawl, most now exist as pets of society's elite."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/9/0/90a4396a-0f22-482b-ad1d-4d9b68a1ed96.jpg"

########## Blockbuster ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DealDamageEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.ForEachPlayerEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.references.Player
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Blockbuster
 * {3}{R}{R}
 * Enchantment
 * {1}{R}, Sacrifice this enchantment: It deals 3 damage to each tapped creature and each player.
 */
val Blockbuster = card("Blockbuster") {
    manaCost = "{3}{R}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Enchantment"
    oracleText = "{1}{R}, Sacrifice this enchantment: It deals 3 damage to each tapped creature and each player."
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{1}{R}"), Costs.SacrificeSelf)
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            Effects.ForEachInGroup(
                GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.tapped()),
                DealDamageEffect(3, EffectTarget.Self)
            ),
            ForEachPlayerEffect(Player.Each, listOf(DealDamageEffect(3, EffectTarget.Controller)))
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "115"
        artist = "Dave Dorman"
        flavorText = "Vendors hung cords heavy with roots and laid out boxes of salted meat, unaware of the fiery disaster swiftly approaching."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/0/0/00a28b9d-1bd2-4ca4-a1e1-4138891d6739.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.EntersTapped


/**
 * Boros Garrison
 * Land
 * This land enters tapped.
 * When this land enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand.
 * {T}: Add {R}{W}.
 */
val BorosGarrison = card("Boros Garrison") {
    manaCost = ""
    colorIdentity = "WR"
    typeLine = "Land"
    oracleText = "This land enters tapped.\nWhen this land enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand.\n{T}: Add {R}{W}."
    replacementEffect(EntersTapped())

    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "275"
        artist = "John Avon"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/7/d/7dfe3f03-078f-44fb-89cd-efa3ebfaf637.jpg"

########## Boros Guildmage ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Boros Guildmage
 * {R/W}{R/W}
 * Creature — Human Wizard
 * 2/2
 * {1}{R}: Target creature gains haste until end of turn.
 * {1}{W}: Target creature gains first strike until end of turn.
 */
val BorosGuildmage = card("Boros Guildmage") {
    manaCost = "{R/W}{R/W}"
    colorIdentity = "WR"
    typeLine = "Creature — Human Wizard"
    oracleText = "{1}{R}: Target creature gains haste until end of turn.\n{1}{W}: Target creature gains first strike until end of turn."
    power = 2
    toughness = 2
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Mana("{1}{R}")
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.HASTE, t)
    }
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Mana("{1}{W}")
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.FIRST_STRIKE, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "242"
        artist = "Paolo Parente"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/0/7/072a1ff1-9c50-426a-a83c-817bde5beab7.jpg"

    manaCost = "{3}{B}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"

    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.Destroy(t, noRegenerate = true)

 * {W}
 * Creature — Human Cleric
 * 1/1
 * {W}, Sacrifice a creature: Prevent the next 1 damage that would be dealt to any target this turn.

    manaCost = "{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Creature — Human Cleric"
    oracleText = "{W}, Sacrifice a creature: Prevent the next 1 damage that would be dealt to any target this turn."

    toughness = 1
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{W}"), Costs.Sacrifice(GameObjectFilter.Creature))
        val t = target("target", AnyTarget())
        effect = Effects.PreventNextDamage(1, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "6"

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Patterns
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.SearchDestination


/**
 * Civic Wayfinder
 * {2}{G}
 * Creature — Elf Druid Warrior
 * 2/2
 * When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
 */
val CivicWayfinder = card("Civic Wayfinder") {
    manaCost = "{2}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Creature — Elf Druid Warrior"
    oracleText = "When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle."
    power = 2
    toughness = 2
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        optional = true
        effect = Patterns.Library.searchLibrary(
            filter = GameObjectFilter.BasicLand,
            destination = SearchDestination.HAND,
            reveal = true
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "157"
        artist = "Cyril Van Der Haegen"
        flavorText = "\"These alleys are not safe. Come, I can guide you back to the market square.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/6/5/654eacc9-5f80-44ea-8d7b-71cd8227fa38.jpg"
    }
}

########## Clutch of the Undercity ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.
// Source: mtgish IR via the coverage bridge (predictive, approximate).
// Before use: (1) finish the STRUCTURE stub(s), (2) write & pass a scenario test, (3) review the rules text.
// Then move into the set's cards/ package (auto-registers via classpath scan).

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.LoseLifeEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetPermanent


/**
 * Clutch of the Undercity
 * {1}{U}{U}{B}
 * Instant
 * Return target permanent to its owner's hand. Its controller loses 3 life.
 * Transmute {1}{U}{B} ({1}{U}{B}, Discard this card: Search your library for a card with the same mana value as this card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Transmute only as a sorcery.)
 */
val ClutchOfTheUndercity = card("Clutch of the Undercity") {
    manaCost = "{1}{U}{U}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "UB"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Return target permanent to its owner's hand. Its controller loses 3 life.\nTransmute {1}{U}{B} ({1}{U}{B}, Discard this card: Search your library for a card with the same mana value as this card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Transmute only as a sorcery.)"
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetPermanent())
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            Effects.Move(t, Zone.HAND),
            LoseLifeEffect(3, EffectTarget.TargetController)
        )
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: Transmute
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "197"
        artist = "Pete Venters"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/2/4/24437641-85a1-4fcd-93dc-bd19a7abf969.jpg"
    }
}

// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.GainLifeEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.references.Player
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.values.DynamicAmount


/**
 * Conclave Phalanx
 * {4}{W}
 * Creature — Human Soldier
 * 2/4
 * Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.)
 * When this creature enters, you gain 1 life for each creature you control.
 */
val ConclavePhalanx = card("Conclave Phalanx") {
    manaCost = "{4}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Creature — Human Soldier"
    oracleText = "Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.)\nWhen this creature enters, you gain 1 life for each creature you control."
    power = 2
    toughness = 4
    keywords(Keyword.CONVOKE)
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        effect = GainLifeEffect(DynamicAmount.AggregateBattlefield(Player.You, GameObjectFilter.Creature))
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "10"
        artist = "Wayne Reynolds"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/8/3/83854443-736b-4650-8a7e-e123ee6e0b8b.jpg"
    }

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity

/**
 * Congregation at Dawn
 * {G}{G}{W}
 * Instant
 * Search your library for up to three creature cards, reveal them, then shuffle and put those cards on top in any order.
 */
val CongregationAtDawn = card("Congregation at Dawn") {
    manaCost = "{G}{G}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "WG"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Search your library for up to three creature cards, reveal them, then shuffle and put those cards on top in any order."
    spell {
        effect = Patterns.Library.searchLibrary(
            filter = GameObjectFilter.Creature,
            count = 3,
            destination = SearchDestination.TOP_OF_LIBRARY,
            reveal = true
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "198"
        artist = "Randy Gallegos"
        flavorText = "\"It is fitting that we meet in the first hour of light, for we are called by the Conclave to pierce a threat of darkness.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/2/f/2f1b950a-b2fe-4afc-bb79-c9f4c272ea36.jpg"

########## Consult the Necrosages ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Patterns
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DrawCardsEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetPlayer


/**
 * Consult the Necrosages
 * {1}{U}{B}
 * Sorcery
 * Choose one —
 * • Target player draws two cards.
 * • Target player discards two cards.
 */
val ConsultTheNecrosages = card("Consult the Necrosages") {
    manaCost = "{1}{U}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "UB"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Choose one —\n• Target player draws two cards.\n• Target player discards two cards."
    spell {
        modal(chooseCount = 1) {
            mode("Target player draws two cards") {
                val t = target("target", TargetPlayer())
                effect = DrawCardsEffect(2, t)
            }
            mode("Target player discards two cards") {
                val t = target("target", TargetPlayer())
                effect = Patterns.Hand.discardCards(2, t)
            }
        }
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "199"
        artist = "Paolo Parente"
        flavorText = "Dimir rank and file never see nor hear their guildmaster. All orders are given through mysterious necrosages who appear from the shadows, tersely toss out a command, and then melt into the darkness."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/6/f/6f51484b-3bad-4332-87f8-61924e153799.jpg"
    }
}

// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.ManaCost
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.CounterCondition
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.CounterEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetSpell


/**
 * Convolute
 * {2}{U}
 * Instant
 * Counter target spell unless its controller pays {4}.
 */
val Convolute = card("Convolute") {
    manaCost = "{2}{U}"
    colorIdentity = "U"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Counter target spell unless its controller pays {4}."
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetSpell())
        effect = CounterEffect(condition = CounterCondition.UnlessPaysMana(ManaCost.parse("{4}")))
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "41"
        artist = "Dany Orizio"
        flavorText = "The words came to the sorcerer's lips but refused to budge any further."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/f/a/fac88052-96a3-4a4d-95a2-c5a652fcb275.jpg"
    }
}

    manaCost = "{2}"
    colorIdentity = "WG"
    typeLine = "Artifact"

########## Cyclopean Snare ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Cyclopean Snare
 * {2}
 * Artifact
 * {3}, {T}: Tap target creature, then return this artifact to its owner's hand.
 */
val CyclopeanSnare = card("Cyclopean Snare") {
    manaCost = "{2}"
    colorIdentity = ""
    typeLine = "Artifact"
    oracleText = "{3}, {T}: Tap target creature, then return this artifact to its owner's hand."
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{3}"), Costs.Tap)
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            Effects.Tap(t),
            Effects.Move(EffectTarget.Self, Zone.HAND)
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "259"
        artist = "Keith Garletts"
        flavorText = "The spoiled, gluttonous halls of the Orzhov teem with gaudy, needless wealth. Even their security measures are made for beauty first, efficiency second."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/2/2/22ba776a-c959-4d15-aa36-9fba1fcb512d.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.GainLifeEffect


/**
 * Dark Heart of the Wood
 * {B}{G}
 * Enchantment
 * Sacrifice a Forest: You gain 3 life.
 */
val DarkHeartOfTheWood = card("Dark Heart of the Wood") {
    manaCost = "{B}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "BG"
    typeLine = "Enchantment"
    oracleText = "Sacrifice a Forest: You gain 3 life."
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Sacrifice(GameObjectFilter.Land.withSubtype(Subtype.FOREST))
        effect = GainLifeEffect(3)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "200"
        artist = "Mark Tedin"
        flavorText = "\"The soil here is rich with the rotting dead, and the sun's fingers barely penetrate the dark canopy. Plant our brethren here. This shall be our sanctuary.\"\n—Savra"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/b/a/baa3ae99-a770-4487-8de6-68a347ee64bb.jpg"
    }

########## Darkblast ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Darkblast
 * {B}
 * Instant
 * Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.
 * Dredge 3 (If you would draw a card, you may mill three cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)
 */
val Darkblast = card("Darkblast") {
    manaCost = "{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.\nDredge 3 (If you would draw a card, you may mill three cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)"
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.ModifyStats(-1, -1, t)
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: Dredge
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "82"
        artist = "Randy Gallegos"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/0/d/0dcaba91-06d3-4492-9e07-36a1b858ca47.jpg"
    }
}

    colorIdentity = "UB"
    typeLine = "Land"
    oracleText = "This land enters tapped.\nWhen this land enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand.\n{T}: Add {U}{B}."

########## Dimir Cutpurse ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Patterns
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DrawCardsEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.references.Player
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Dimir Cutpurse
 * {1}{U}{B}
 * Creature — Spirit
 * 2/2
 * Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player discards a card and you draw a card.
 */
val DimirCutpurse = card("Dimir Cutpurse") {
    manaCost = "{1}{U}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "UB"
    typeLine = "Creature — Spirit"
    oracleText = "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player discards a card and you draw a card."
    power = 2
    toughness = 2
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.DealsCombatDamageToPlayer
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            Patterns.Hand.discardCards(1, EffectTarget.PlayerRef(Player.TriggeringPlayer)),
            DrawCardsEffect(1)
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "201"
        artist = "Kev Walker"
        flavorText = "Other guilds demand tolls from those who travel their territories, but not House Dimir. It takes its share secretly, one coin purse at a time."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/0/f/0f2b0b24-83bf-479b-baa4-3244a114852d.jpg"
    }
}

########## Dimir Guildmage ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Patterns
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.TimingRule
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DrawCardsEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetPlayer


/**
 * Dimir Guildmage
 * {U/B}{U/B}
 * Creature — Human Wizard
 * 2/2
 * ({U/B} can be paid with either {U} or {B}.)
 * {3}{U}: Target player draws a card. Activate only as a sorcery.
 * {3}{B}: Target player discards a card. Activate only as a sorcery.
 */
val DimirGuildmage = card("Dimir Guildmage") {
    manaCost = "{U/B}{U/B}"
    colorIdentity = "UB"
    typeLine = "Creature — Human Wizard"
    oracleText = "({U/B} can be paid with either {U} or {B}.)\n{3}{U}: Target player draws a card. Activate only as a sorcery.\n{3}{B}: Target player discards a card. Activate only as a sorcery."
    power = 2
    toughness = 2
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Mana("{3}{U}")
        val t = target("target", TargetPlayer())
        effect = DrawCardsEffect(1, t)
        timing = TimingRule.SorcerySpeed
    }
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Mana("{3}{B}")
        val t = target("target", TargetPlayer())
        effect = Patterns.Hand.discardCards(1, t)
        timing = TimingRule.SorcerySpeed
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "245"
        artist = "Adam Rex"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/6/9/69b822aa-4144-400a-b993-f146cbeed54f.jpg"
    }
}

########## Dimir House Guard ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.
// Source: mtgish IR via the coverage bridge (predictive, approximate).
// Before use: (1) finish the STRUCTURE stub(s), (2) write & pass a scenario test, (3) review the rules text.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.RegenerateEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Dimir House Guard
 * {3}{B}
 * Creature — Skeleton
 * 2/3
 * Fear (This creature can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or black creatures.)
 * Sacrifice a creature: Regenerate this creature.
 * Transmute {1}{B}{B} ({1}{B}{B}, Discard this card: Search your library for a card with the same mana value as this card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Transmute only as a sorcery.)
 */
val DimirHouseGuard = card("Dimir House Guard") {
    manaCost = "{3}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Creature — Skeleton"
    oracleText = "Fear (This creature can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or black creatures.)\nSacrifice a creature: Regenerate this creature.\nTransmute {1}{B}{B} ({1}{B}{B}, Discard this card: Search your library for a card with the same mana value as this card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Transmute only as a sorcery.)"
    power = 2
    toughness = 3
    keywords(Keyword.FEAR)
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Sacrifice(GameObjectFilter.Creature)
        effect = RegenerateEffect(EffectTarget.Self)
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: Transmute
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "83"
        artist = "John Zeleznik"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/9/a/9a021caf-d9e7-470b-85be-3af42a3adfd3.jpg"
    }
}

    toughness = 3

// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity


/**
 * Dimir Machinations
 * {2}{B}
 * Sorcery
 * Look at the top three cards of target player's library. Exile any number of those cards, then put the rest back in any order.
 * Transmute {1}{B}{B} ({1}{B}{B}, Discard this card: Search your library for a card with the same mana value as this card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Transmute only as a sorcery.)
 */
val DimirMachinations = card("Dimir Machinations") {
    manaCost = "{2}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Look at the top three cards of target player's library. import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature

 * Disembowel
 * {X}{B}
 * Instant
 * Destroy target creature with mana value X.
 */
val Disembowel = card("Disembowel") {
    manaCost = "{X}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Destroy target creature with mana value X."
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.Move(t, Zone.GRAVEYARD, byDestruction = true)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "85"
        artist = "Chengo McFlingers"
        flavorText = "\"We thought we found the victim's clothes lumped in the street. As it turned out, it was the victim, insides sucked out—just a sack of skin and robes.\"\n—Agrus Kos"

/**
 * Divebomber Griffin
 * {3}{W}{W}
 * Creature — Griffin
 * 3/2
 * Flying
 * {T}, Sacrifice this creature: It deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.
 */
val DivebomberGriffin = card("Divebomber Griffin") {
    manaCost = "{3}{W}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Creature — Griffin"
    oracleText = "Flying\n{T}, Sacrifice this creature: It deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature."
    power = 3
    toughness = 2
    keywords(Keyword.FLYING)
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Tap, Costs.SacrificeSelf)
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.AttackingOrBlockingCreature))
        effect = DealDamageEffect(3, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "14"
        artist = "Kev Walker"
        flavorText = "Justice flies swiftly on angry wings."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/8/a/8aa5a010-6253-4dfb-952e-df05ff08eb9e.jpg"

########## Dogpile ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DealDamageEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.references.Player
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.AnyTarget
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.values.DynamicAmount


/**
 * Dogpile
 * {3}{R}
 * Instant
 * Dogpile deals damage to any target equal to the number of attacking creatures you control.
 */
val Dogpile = card("Dogpile") {
    manaCost = "{3}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Dogpile deals damage to any target equal to the number of attacking creatures you control."
    spell {
        val t = target("target", AnyTarget())
        effect = DealDamageEffect(
            DynamicAmount.AggregateBattlefield(Player.You, GameObjectFilter.Creature.attacking()),
            t
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "120"
        artist = "Jeff Miracola"
        flavorText = "There is no shelter from this storm, its rain of fists, or the thunderous cackles of bloodlust."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/2/6/26316b00-22db-4546-8366-8a624f10c1ba.jpg"
    }
}

 * Doubling Season
 * {4}{G}
 * Enchantment
 * If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.
 * If an effect would put one or more counters on a permanent you control, it puts twice that many of those counters on that permanent instead.
 */

    manaCost = "{4}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Enchantment"
    oracleText = "If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.\nIf an effect would put one or more counters on a permanent you control, it puts twice that many of those counters on that permanent instead."

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetObject


/**
 * Dowsing Shaman
 * {4}{G}
 * Creature — Centaur Shaman
 * 3/4
 * {2}{G}, {T}: Return target enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.
 */
val DowsingShaman = card("Dowsing Shaman") {
    manaCost = "{4}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Creature — Centaur Shaman"
    oracleText = "{2}{G}, {T}: Return target enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand."
    power = 3
    toughness = 4
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{2}{G}"), Costs.Tap)
        val t = target(
            "target",
            TargetObject(filter = TargetFilter(GameObjectFilter.Enchantment.ownedByYou(), zone = Zone.GRAVEYARD))
        )
        effect = Effects.Move(t, Zone.HAND)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "159"
        artist = "Wayne Reynolds"
        flavorText = "He combs the streets looking for the lost light, the discarded enigmas of the city."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/b/3/b34ac5bd-2d2f-4c44-8f2d-aaa8fa18e81a.jpg"
    }
}

 * Dromad Purebred

 * 1/5

    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Creature — Camel Beast"
    oracleText = "Whenever this creature is dealt damage, you gain 1 life."
    power = 1
    toughness = 5

        trigger = Triggers.TakesDamage

        rarity = Rarity.COMMON

########## Elves of Deep Shadow ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Color
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.TimingRule
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DealDamageEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.references.Player
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Elves of Deep Shadow
 * {G}
 * Creature — Elf Druid
 * 1/1
 * {T}: Add {B}. This creature deals 1 damage to you.
 */
val ElvesOfDeepShadow = card("Elves of Deep Shadow") {
    manaCost = "{G}"
    colorIdentity = "BG"
    typeLine = "Creature — Elf Druid"
    oracleText = "{T}: Add {B}. This creature deals 1 damage to you."
    power = 1
    toughness = 1
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Tap
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            Effects.AddMana(Color.BLACK),
            DealDamageEffect(1, EffectTarget.PlayerRef(Player.You))
        )
        manaAbility = true
        timing = TimingRule.ManaAbility
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "161"
        artist = "Justin Sweet"
        flavorText = "Cast out of the Conclave generations ago, these elves found a home in the corrupted districts of the Golgari."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/7/b/7bea6dea-d767-4092-a285-305d9997357a.jpg"
    }
}

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Elvish Skysweeper
 * {G}
 * Creature — Elf Warrior
 * 1/1
 * {4}{G}, Sacrifice a creature: Destroy target creature with flying.
 */
val ElvishSkysweeper = card("Elvish Skysweeper") {
    manaCost = "{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Creature — Elf Warrior"
    oracleText = "{4}{G}, Sacrifice a creature: Destroy target creature with flying."
    power = 1
    toughness = 1
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{4}{G}"), Costs.Sacrifice(GameObjectFilter.Creature))
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature.withKeyword(Keyword.FLYING)))
        effect = Effects.Move(t, Zone.GRAVEYARD, byDestruction = true)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "162"
        artist = "Mark Tedin"
        flavorText = "The spires of Ravnica are no different from the tall trees of other planes. The elves navigate and protect them just the same."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/e/8/e80b91e8-c498-4178-8310-3cd3b039a3dc.jpg"

// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.AbilityFlag
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.GrantKeywordEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Ethereal Usher
 * {5}{U}
 * Creature — Spirit
 * 2/3
 * {U}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.
 * Transmute {1}{U}{U} ({1}{U}{U}, Discard this card: Search your library for a card with the same mana value as this card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Transmute only as a sorcery.)
 */
val EtherealUsher = card("Ethereal Usher") {
    manaCost = "{5}{U}"
    colorIdentity = "U"
    typeLine = "Creature — Spirit"
    oracleText = "{U}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.\nTransmute {1}{U}{U} ({1}{U}{U}, Discard this card: Search your library for a card with the same mana value as this card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Transmute only as a sorcery.)"
    power = 2
    toughness = 3
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{U}"), Costs.Tap)
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = GrantKeywordEffect(AbilityFlag.CANT_BE_BLOCKED.name, t)
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: Transmute
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "47"
        artist = "Mark A. Nelson"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/9/0/908901b7-fb40-4358-bca5-5e71bdafcbe7.jpg"
    }
}

########## Farseek ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Patterns
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.SearchDestination


/**
 * Farseek
 * {1}{G}
 * Sorcery
 * Search your library for a Plains, Island, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
 */
val Farseek = card("Farseek") {
    manaCost = "{1}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Search your library for a Plains, Island, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle."
    spell {
        effect = Patterns.Library.searchLibrary(
            filter = GameObjectFilter.Land.withAnySubtype("Plains", "Island", "Swamp", "Mountain"),
            destination = SearchDestination.BATTLEFIELD,
            entersTapped = true
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "163"
        artist = "Martina Pilcerova"
        flavorText = "\"How truly vast this city must be, that I have traveled so far and seen so much, yet never once found the place where the buildings fail.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/8/1/8180abec-9459-4b81-987e-b1794e45d543.jpg"
    }
}

    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.\nFiery Conclusion deals 5 damage to target creature."
    additionalCost(Costs.additional.SacrificePermanent(GameObjectFilter.Creature))
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = DealDamageEffect(5, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "122"

########## Flame-Kin Zealot ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Flame-Kin Zealot
 * {1}{R}{R}{W}
 * Creature — Elemental Berserker
 * 2/2
 * When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain haste until end of turn.
 */
val FlameKinZealot = card("Flame-Kin Zealot") {
    manaCost = "{1}{R}{R}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "WR"
    typeLine = "Creature — Elemental Berserker"
    oracleText = "When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain haste until end of turn."
    power = 2
    toughness = 2
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        effect = Effects.ForEachInGroup(
            GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.youControl()),
            Effects.Composite(
                Effects.ModifyStats(1, 1, EffectTarget.Self),
                Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.HASTE, EffectTarget.Self)
            )
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "206"
        artist = "Arnie Swekel"
        flavorText = "Boros soldiers are like a cache of bombs ready to explode, and the flame-kin light their fuses."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/a/e/aec53f16-5bf7-4ef5-b83e-9e36463d1640.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Subtype
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DrawCardsEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.references.Player
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.values.DynamicAmount


/**
 * Flow of Ideas
 * {5}{U}
 * Sorcery
 * Draw a card for each Island you control.
 */
val FlowOfIdeas = card("Flow of Ideas") {
    manaCost = "{5}{U}"
    colorIdentity = "U"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Draw a card for each Island you control."
    spell {
        effect = DrawCardsEffect(
            DynamicAmount.AggregateBattlefield(Player.You, GameObjectFilter.Land.withSubtype(Subtype.ISLAND))
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "50"
        artist = "Dan Murayama Scott"
        flavorText = "\"A system to direct the flow of Ravnica's entire water supply? Thinking a bit small, aren't we?\"\n—Trivaz, Izzet mage"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/2/7/27203b79-b383-4698-8b81-b6198c51c2f6.jpg"
    }
}

// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Patterns
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetPlayer


/**
 * Glimpse the Unthinkable
 * {U}{B}
 * Sorcery
 * Target player mills ten cards.
 */
val GlimpseTheUnthinkable = card("Glimpse the Unthinkable") {
    manaCost = "{U}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "UB"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Target player mills ten cards."
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetPlayer())
        effect = Patterns.Library.mill(10, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "208"
        artist = "Brandon Kitkouski"
        flavorText = "\"I am confident that if anyone actually penetrates our facades, even the most perceptive would still be fundamentally unprepared for the truth of House Dimir.\"\n—Szadek"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/4/8/48058253-54b8-403b-8d95-94d8da986e69.jpg"
    }
}

// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.MustBeBlocked
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Goblin Fire Fiend
 * {3}{R}
 * Creature — Goblin Berserker
 * 1/1
 * Haste
 * This creature must be blocked if able.
 * {R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
 */
val GoblinFireFiend = card("Goblin Fire Fiend") {
    manaCost = "{3}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Creature — Goblin Berserker"
    oracleText = "Haste\nThis creature must be blocked if able.\n{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn."
    power = 1
    toughness = 1
    keywords(Keyword.HASTE)
    staticAbility {
        ability = MustBeBlocked()
    }
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Mana("{R}")
        effect = Effects.ModifyStats(1, 0, EffectTarget.Self)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "127"
        artist = "Paolo Parente"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/6/4/64d3b2d2-4ec2-495d-833d-7476cbfc80f6.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity


/**
 * Golgari Germination
 * {1}{B}{G}
 * Enchantment
 * Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.
 */
val GolgariGermination = card("Golgari Germination") {
    manaCost = "{1}{B}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "BG"
    typeLine = "Enchantment"
    oracleText = "Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token."
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: trigger-shape
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "209"
        artist = "Thomas M. Baxa"
        flavorText = "The Golgari don't bury their dead. They plant them."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/2/4/24a1db16-d936-4f92-9611-327a988ce04c.jpg"

########## Golgari Grave-Troll ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.
// Source: mtgish IR via the coverage bridge (predictive, approximate).
// Before use: (1) finish the STRUCTURE stub(s), (2) write & pass a scenario test, (3) review the rules text.
// Then move into the set's cards/ package (auto-registers via classpath scan).

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.EntersWithDynamicCounters
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.references.Player
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.values.DynamicAmount


/**
 * Golgari Grave-Troll
 * {4}{G}
 * Creature — Troll Skeleton
 * 0/0
 * This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each creature card in your graveyard.
 * {1}, Remove a +1/+1 counter from this creature: Regenerate this creature.
 * Dredge 6 (If you would draw a card, you may mill six cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)
 */
val GolgariGraveTroll = card("Golgari Grave-Troll") {
    manaCost = "{4}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Creature — Troll Skeleton"
    oracleText = "This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each creature card in your graveyard.\n{1}, Remove a +1/+1 counter from this creature: Regenerate this creature.\nDredge 6 (If you would draw a card, you may mill six cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)"
    power = 0
    toughness = 0
    replacementEffect(
        EntersWithDynamicCounters(count = DynamicAmount.Count(Player.You, Zone.GRAVEYARD, GameObjectFilter.Creature))
    )
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: activated-cost
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "167"
        artist = "Greg Hildebrandt"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/f/6/f61b50e6-2166-435d-bf48-c4a0cff9999c.jpg"
    }
}

########## Golgari Guildmage ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Counters
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.AddCountersEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetObject


/**
 * Golgari Guildmage
 * {B/G}{B/G}
 * Creature — Elf Shaman
 * 2/2
 * {4}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
 * {4}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.
 */
val GolgariGuildmage = card("Golgari Guildmage") {
    manaCost = "{B/G}{B/G}"
    colorIdentity = "BG"
    typeLine = "Creature — Elf Shaman"
    oracleText = "{4}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.\n{4}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature."
    power = 2
    toughness = 2
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{4}{B}"), Costs.Sacrifice(GameObjectFilter.Creature))
        val t = target("target", TargetObject(filter = TargetFilter.CreatureInYourGraveyard))
        effect = Effects.Move(t, Zone.HAND)
    }
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Mana("{4}{G}")
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = AddCountersEffect(counterType = Counters.PLUS_ONE_PLUS_ONE, count = 1, target = t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "248"
        artist = "Zoltan Boros & Gabor Szikszai"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/d/9/d91b994b-3cf2-43f7-8af6-7925e882208f.jpg"
    }
}

 * Golgari Rotwurm
 * {3}{B}{G}
 * Creature — Zombie Wurm
 * 5/4
 * {B}, Sacrifice a creature: Target player loses 1 life.
 */

    manaCost = "{3}{B}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "BG"
    typeLine = "Creature — Zombie Wurm"
    oracleText = "{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Target player loses 1 life."
    power = 5
    toughness = 4
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{B}"), Costs.Sacrifice(GameObjectFilter.Creature))
        val t = target("target", TargetPlayer())
        effect = LoseLifeEffect(1, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "210"
        artist = "Wayne England"
        flavorText = "Like corpse-worms through a carapace, rotwurms slide through the hollowed bones of the undercity."

 * Artifact

    manaCost = "{2}"
    colorIdentity = "BG"
    typeLine = "Artifact"
    oracleText = "{1}, {T}: Add {B}{G}."
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{1}"), Costs.Tap)
        effect = Effects.Composite(Effects.AddMana(Color.BLACK, 1), Effects.AddMana(Color.GREEN, 1))
        manaAbility = true
        timing = TimingRule.ManaAbility
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "262"
        artist = "Greg Hildebrandt"

 * Halcyon Glaze
 * {1}{U}{U}
 * Enchantment
 * Whenever you cast a creature spell, this enchantment becomes a 4/4 Illusion creature with flying in addition to its other types until end of turn.
 */

    manaCost = "{1}{U}{U}"
    colorIdentity = "U"

########## Hammerfist Giant ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DealDamageEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.ForEachPlayerEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.references.Player
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Hammerfist Giant
 * {4}{R}{R}
 * Creature — Giant Warrior
 * 5/4
 * {T}: This creature deals 4 damage to each creature without flying and each player.
 */
val HammerfistGiant = card("Hammerfist Giant") {
    manaCost = "{4}{R}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Creature — Giant Warrior"
    oracleText = "{T}: This creature deals 4 damage to each creature without flying and each player."
    power = 5
    toughness = 4
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Tap
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            Effects.ForEachInGroup(
                GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.withoutKeyword(Keyword.FLYING)),
                DealDamageEffect(4, EffectTarget.Self)
            ),
            ForEachPlayerEffect(Player.Each, listOf(DealDamageEffect(4, EffectTarget.Controller)))
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "130"
        artist = "Carl Critchlow"
        flavorText = "\"Oh sure, they buy a lot of ale, but I always find myself needing to rebuild after the giants have paid a visit.\"\n—Belko, owner of Titan's Keg tavern"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/4/4/446f946d-9715-466e-b322-905995d28107.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.ForEachTargetEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Hex
 * {4}{B}{B}
 * Sorcery
 * Destroy six target creatures.
 */
val Hex = card("Hex") {
    manaCost = "{4}{B}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Destroy six target creatures."
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(count = 6, filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = ForEachTargetEffect(
            listOf(Effects.Move(EffectTarget.ContextTarget(0), Zone.GRAVEYARD, byDestruction = true))
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "89"
        artist = "Michael Sutfin"
        flavorText = "When killing five just isn't enough."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/f/6/f6af730f-a86d-4b0f-a120-fb56f065351b.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.LoseLifeEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetPlayer


/**
 * Infectious Host
 * {2}{B}
 * Creature — Zombie
 * 1/1
 * When this creature dies, target player loses 2 life.
 */
val InfectiousHost = card("Infectious Host") {
    manaCost = "{2}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Creature — Zombie"
    oracleText = "When this creature dies, target player loses 2 life."
    power = 1
    toughness = 1
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.Dies
        val t = target("target", TargetPlayer())
        effect = LoseLifeEffect(2, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "91"
        artist = "rk post"
        flavorText = "\"Lost man, dead man, knocking on the door. Cankerman, soreman, knock no more.\"\n—Ravnican children's rhyme"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/1/1/11858b4f-3a90-4990-9984-d888c000ec73.jpg"
    }

// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Ivy Dancer
 * {2}{G}
 * Creature — Dryad Shaman
 * 1/2
 * {T}: Target creature gains forestwalk until end of turn. (It can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Forest.)
 */
val IvyDancer = card("Ivy Dancer") {
    manaCost = "{2}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Creature — Dryad Shaman"
    oracleText = "{T}: Target creature gains forestwalk until end of turn. (It can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Forest.)"
    power = 1
    toughness = 2
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Tap
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.FORESTWALK, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "171"
        artist = "Terese Nielsen"
        flavorText = "Her ivy locks are a remnant of the wooded wilds now lost to Ravnica forever."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/7/3/73597c90-a527-4338-9668-126c6cf15927.jpg"

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.ZonePlacement
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetObject


/**
 * Junktroller
 * {4}
 * Artifact Creature — Golem
 * 0/6
 * Defender
 * {T}: Put target card from a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library.
 */
val Junktroller = card("Junktroller") {
    manaCost = "{4}"
    colorIdentity = ""
    typeLine = "Artifact Creature — Golem"
    oracleText = "Defender\n{T}: Put target card from a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library."
    power = 0
    toughness = 6
    keywords(Keyword.DEFENDER)
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Tap
        val t = target("target", TargetObject(filter = TargetFilter.CardInGraveyard))
        effect = Effects.Move(t, Zone.LIBRARY, ZonePlacement.Bottom)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "264"
        artist = "Chippy"
        flavorText = "One man's trash is another man's troller."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/5/e/5e2c5f0a-755f-4d4f-b5f8-a938562797f9.jpg"
    }
}

########## Keening Banshee ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Keening Banshee
 * {2}{B}{B}
 * Creature — Spirit
 * 2/2
 * Flying
 * When this creature enters, target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.
 */
val KeeningBanshee = card("Keening Banshee") {
    manaCost = "{2}{B}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Creature — Spirit"
    oracleText = "Flying\nWhen this creature enters, target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn."
    power = 2
    toughness = 2
    keywords(Keyword.FLYING)
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.ModifyStats(-2, -2, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "92"
        artist = "Robert Bliss"
        flavorText = "Her cold wail echoes in the alleys and under-eaves, finding the unfortunate and turning their blood to ice."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/0/8/0866b383-dced-459e-9510-38248a29dd14.jpg"
    }
}

########## Last Gasp ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Last Gasp
 * {1}{B}
 * Instant
 * Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.
 */
val LastGasp = card("Last Gasp") {
    manaCost = "{1}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn."
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.ModifyStats(-3, -3, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "93"
        artist = "Thomas M. Baxa"
        flavorText = "\"Allow me a moment to catch your breath.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/3/4/34e035b3-bd83-43a4-8f31-d2393d29cd94.jpg"
    }
}

########## Life from the Loam ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.
// Source: mtgish IR via the coverage bridge (predictive, approximate).
// Before use: (1) finish the STRUCTURE stub(s), (2) write & pass a scenario test, (3) review the rules text.
// Then move into the set's cards/ package (auto-registers via classpath scan).

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.ForEachTargetEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetObject


/**
 * Life from the Loam
 * {1}{G}
 * Sorcery
 * Return up to three target land cards from your graveyard to your hand.
 * Dredge 3 (If you would draw a card, you may mill three cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)
 */
val LifeFromTheLoam = card("Life from the Loam") {
    manaCost = "{1}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Return up to three target land cards from your graveyard to your hand.\nDredge 3 (If you would draw a card, you may mill three cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)"
    spell {
        val t = target(
            "target",
            TargetObject(
                optional = true,
                count = 3,
                filter = TargetFilter(GameObjectFilter.Land.ownedByYou(), zone = Zone.GRAVEYARD)
            )
        )
        effect = ForEachTargetEffect(listOf(Effects.Move(EffectTarget.ContextTarget(0), Zone.HAND)))
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: Dredge
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "172"
        artist = "Terese Nielsen"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/7/a/7ac16d09-8bc7-407c-a757-666f4707bc90.jpg"
    }
}

########## Lightning Helix ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DealDamageEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.GainLifeEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.AnyTarget


/**
 * Lightning Helix
 * {R}{W}
 * Instant
 * Lightning Helix deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.
 */
val LightningHelix = card("Lightning Helix") {
    manaCost = "{R}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "WR"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Lightning Helix deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life."
    spell {
        val t = target("target", AnyTarget())
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            DealDamageEffect(3, t),
            GainLifeEffect(3)
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "213"
        artist = "Kev Walker"
        flavorText = "Though less well-known than its army of soldiers, the Boros Legion's mage-priests are as respected by the innocent as they are hated by the ghosts of the guilty."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/1/b/1b2ecf55-c1cc-4b28-b7ce-e1b25305155e.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.GainLifeEffect


/**
 * Loxodon Hierarch
 * {2}{G}{W}
 * Creature — Elephant Cleric
 * 4/4
 * When this creature enters, you gain 4 life.
 * {G}{W}, Sacrifice this creature: Regenerate each creature you control.
 */
val LoxodonHierarch = card("Loxodon Hierarch") {
    manaCost = "{2}{G}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "WG"
    typeLine = "Creature — Elephant Cleric"
    oracleText = "When this creature enters, you gain 4 life.\n{G}{W}, Sacrifice this creature: Regenerate each creature you control."
    power = 4
    toughness = 4
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        effect = GainLifeEffect(4)
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: RegenerateEachPermanent
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "214"
        artist = "Kev Walker"
        flavorText = "\"I have lived long, and I remember how this city once was. If my death serves to bring back the Ravnica in my memory, then so be it.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/a/1/a1d3ccca-8040-4a5f-9f2b-6fdb1a033234.jpg"
    }
}

 * Instant
 * Cast this spell only before attackers are declared.
 * You choose which creatures attack this turn.
 * You choose which creatures block this turn and how those creatures block.

    manaCost = "{2}{R/W}{R/W}"
    colorIdentity = "WR"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Cast this spell only before attackers are declared.\nYou choose which creatures attack this turn.\nYou choose which creatures block this turn and how those creatures block."

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity


/**
 * Mindleech Mass
 * {5}{U}{B}{B}
 * Creature — Horror
 * 6/6
 * Trample
 * Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may look at that player's hand. If you do, you may cast a spell from among those cards without paying its mana cost.
 */
val MindleechMass = card("Mindleech Mass") {
    manaCost = "{5}{U}{B}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "UB"
    typeLine = "Creature — Horror"
    oracleText = "Trample\nWhenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may look at that player's hand. If you do, you may cast a spell from among those cards without paying its mana cost."
    power = 6
    toughness = 6
    keywords(Keyword.TRAMPLE)
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: LookAtPlayersHandAndMayChooseACardToCastWithoutPaying
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "215"
        artist = "Kev Walker"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/7/c/7cd1ace7-d4fe-4f96-9434-7ab1442bf36f.jpg"

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity


/**
 * Mindmoil
 * {4}{R}
 * Enchantment
 * Whenever you cast a spell, put the cards in your hand on the bottom of your library in any order, then draw that many cards.
 */
val Mindmoil = card("Mindmoil") {
    manaCost = "{4}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Enchantment"
    oracleText = "Whenever you cast a spell, put the cards in your hand on the bottom of your library in any order, then draw that many cards."
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: PutAllCardsFromHandOnBottomOfLibraryAnyOrder
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "135"
        artist = "Alex Horley-Orlandelli"
        flavorText = "\"My criticism of the Izzet is that their impulse for learning seems too much like impulse and too little like learning.\"\n—Trigori, Azorius senator"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/0/c/0ccc79f7-2f35-4daf-a0c2-775f5fa6c249.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Targets
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.ModifyStats


/**
 * Moldervine Cloak
 * {2}{G}
 * Enchantment — Aura
 * Enchant creature
 * Enchanted creature gets +3/+3.
 * Dredge 2 (If you would draw a card, you may mill two cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)
 */
val MoldervineCloak = card("Moldervine Cloak") {
    manaCost = "{2}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Enchantment — Aura"
    oracleText = "Enchant creature\nEnchanted creature gets +3/+3.\nDredge 2 (If you would draw a card, you may mill two cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)"
    auraTarget = Targets.Creature
    staticAbility {
        ability = ModifyStats(3, 3)
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: Dredge
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "173"
        artist = "Wayne England"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/8/7/871c3f80-aaa7-485f-b519-57363f5905dd.jpg"
    }
}

// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.LoseLifeEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Moroii
 * {2}{U}{B}
 * Creature — Vampire
 * 4/4
 * Flying
 * At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life.
 */
val Moroii = card("Moroii") {
    manaCost = "{2}{U}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "UB"
    typeLine = "Creature — Vampire"
    oracleText = "Flying\nAt the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life."
    power = 4
    toughness = 4
    keywords(Keyword.FLYING)
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.YourUpkeep
        effect = LoseLifeEffect(1, EffectTarget.Controller)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "216"
        artist = "Dan Murayama Scott"
        flavorText = "\"Touched by moroii\"\n—Undercity slang meaning \"to grow old\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/3/d/3de9ce70-67d1-4007-94ed-4545867e90c8.jpg"
    }
}
